# Third-party fonts

Runtime font files live in `web/capacitor-ui/public/fonts/` because the dashboard loads them directly. The original notices in this directory are documentation and must not be copied into the public bundle.

The project MIT license does not replace a font author's license. Some archived notices restrict commercial use, so verify the terms of every font before commercial distribution or replacement. New fonts need a source URL, author and license record before they are committed.
